scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:database && npm run build:backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:railway: npm run build:database && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run migrate:deploy -w database && npm run start -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
